ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
rice noodles 79.3% (rice 90%, modified starch, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer (monosodium glutamate), stabilizer (guar gum)),
spices 12.4% (sugar, salt, flavor enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate), flavor, garlic powder, stabilizer (xanthan gum), tapioca, ginger powder, chili powder 1%, acidity regulator (citric acid), colours(caramel, carotenes), anti-caking agent (E551)),
6.5% oil (refined palm oil, fried garlic (garlic, refined palm oil), color (carotenes), antioxidant (E306)),
dried vegetables 1.4% (carrot, cabbage, leek), paprika 0.4%.
